CustomField.description: Indicates Invoiced Amount after adjustments in ledger currency.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(leaseworks__Multicurrency_Enabled__c), leaseworks__Invoiced_Amount_Formula__c, IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c), NULL, IF( leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c = 0, 0, leaseworks__Invoiced_Amount_Formula__c * leaseworks__Exchange_Rate__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates Invoiced Amount after adjustments in ledger currency.
CustomField.label: Adjusted Invoiced Amount (Ledger)
